title: WindCuff
description:
Arrest all dissenters! 
Make your players law-abiding
body:
[![first](https://i.imgur.com/nr9XNWY.png)](https://dsc.gg/WindStudio) ![second](https://i.imgur.com/bPiQHLp.gif) [![third](https://i.imgur.com/YPZPWyD.png)](https://youtu.be/C9Q4qAA_pa4) Image transcription:
**WindCuff©**
**Make your players law-abiding**
**Widely Configurable**
Our plugin has wide possibilities of configuration.
You can literally customize every thing of plugin.
Every action you can configure as you like to.
**Incredible Beauty**
We made it possible to send messages
as advancement message known as Toast.
You can choose between ActionBar or Toast
messages and make your experience more beauty. **Infinite Features**
Our plugin has infinite features for its kind.
You can place a leash on player, crack cuffs,
repair broken handcuffs, craft them,
place gag on cuffed player. Player who cuffed
drops his items from hands. You can use
bossbars and placeholders to mark cuffed player.
Create custom handcuffsrecipe.
More features you can find out in-game. **Light As Feather**
Lightweight feather flies in wind.
Our plugin light as this feather.
**WindCuff** does not use tons of RAM
and touching TPS.
Just install it and play, forgot about any problems!
**Play As You Like**
Our plugin perfectly for RP. Do what you want.
This plugin is ultimate tool for RP creation.
Feel you as policeman and make unique gameplay moments!
You will remember whole it!
**Friendly Support**
Plugin - isn't only thing we can be proud of.
Our support can help you with most of problems.
You can ask every question - we'll help you!
**Future Plans**
Our plugin plans out many new functional!
You will get frequent updates with many of functional!
Need more? No problem!
You can suggest any your idea - we will release it!
**Purely Modern**
Plugin has amazing functionality.
"All-in-one" - it is. Use it anywhere and anytime.
Just plug&play. All modern features this plugin has.
By the way, can you even find plugin like this for free?
**Plugin's Showcase**
Wanna see out main plugin's functions?
Yes, you can do it. Specially for you we made
showcase video where you can see all you want.
Just tap button below and start your viewing.
[**Click me to see video**](https://youtu.be/C9Q4qAA_pa4?si=UhBnrr36g6gZGCte)
